headline: New York Pension Wants Data Centers to Be Good Neighbors
summary: Pension funds are joining the crusade to shield communities from the noisy, energy-guzzling impact of AI data centers.  The New York State Common Retirement Fund wrote to Amazon, Meta Platforms, Alphabet and 15 other tech companies, asking them to prioritize the needs of communities where they own, operate, or lease data centers.  In a letter, it said this was to “protect shareholder value and ensure sustainable growth.”

raw.headline: New York Pension Wants Data Centers to Be Good Neighbors
raw.summary: Pension funds are joining the crusade to shield communities from the noisy, energy-guzzling impact of AI data centers.  The New York State Common Retirement Fund wrote to Amazon, Meta Platforms, Alphabet and 15 other tech companies, asking them to prioritize the needs of communities where they own, operate, or lease data centers.  In a letter, it said this was to “protect shareholder value and ensure sustainable growth.”
